record.field: # ASSUMING THIS IS A SETTING setting_house_keeping_approver = True if record.stage_id == env.ref('project_task_type_18'): # Ready record['state'] = '1_done' if record.stage_id == env.ref('project_task_type_17'): # Clean if not setting_house_keeping_approver: record['stage_id'] = env.ref('project_task_type_18') # Ready since no need for approver record['state'] = '1_done' record["state"] = '1_done'
# ASSUMED THIS IS THE SETTING setting_house_keeping_approver = True if not setting_house_keeping_approver: record['stage'] = env.ref('project_task_type_18') # Ready
